briefs.title: Council to Consider: Renewing Road Marking Paint and Glass Bead Contract for 24 Months
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a second renewal of the City's contract for road marking paint and glass beads — the materials used to paint lines and markings on city roads. The proposed renewal would run from March 1, 2026 to February 29, 2028, at an estimated cost of $380,000 with no price increase per unit compared to the previous term.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision if your business supplies road marking materials or related services to the City.

key_dates.label: Burnaby road marking paint contract 2nd renewal proposed start date
